perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a flat cap and sunglasses is walking on a city street, talking to the camera. (2) Scene shifts to the man driving a car; he removes his sunglasses to put on clear glasses and gestures with surprise. (3) The man walks into 'Lianhe Optical', a modern optical shop. (4) He interacts with high-tech Zeiss eye examination equipment, including a 3D positioning device and a heat-pad eye mask. (5) Close-ups of various glasses frames and lens measurement screens. (6) The man sits at a desk with a male optician who presents him with finished glasses and several Zeiss-branded accessory boxes. (7) Final shot of the man posing with his new glasses in the store.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic pop background music starts. A middle-aged male voice (Tim) speaks enthusiastically to the audience. (2) Ambient noise of a car interior (low engine hum) is audible as the male voice continues in a more conversational tone. (3) Music remains constant as the scene shifts to the store. High-pitched digital beeps from medical equipment can be heard during the examination sequence. (4) A second male voice (the optician) enters briefly, speaking in a professional and calm tone while explaining the products. (5) The music swells slightly towards the end as the main speaker gives a concluding recommendation.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 我的美食地图又来了 (Decorative: Hook - 'My food map is back'). (2) 這次要帶大家來新竹 (Functional: Translation - 'This time I'm taking everyone to Hsinchu'). (3) 聯合眼鏡 護眼旗艦店 (Functional: Brand name - 'Lianhe Optical Eye Care Flagship Store'). (4) 蔡司3D定位儀 (Functional: Product - 'Zeiss 3D Positioning Instrument'). (5) 5 ways 精準量測 (Decorative: Highlight - '5 ways precision measurement'). (6) 從台北跑來新竹 (Functional: Narrative - 'Ran from Taipei to Hsinchu'). (7) 蔡司精美禮盒 (Functional: Item description - 'Zeiss exquisite gift box').

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Traveling -> Arrival/Problem -> Demonstration of Tech -> Result/Unboxing

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator (Tim), 1 male optician in-store, 1 female visible in a small circular graphic overlay.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, a light green t-shirt with 'ROOTS' branding, and initially wearing aviator-style sunglasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor city streets with low-rise buildings; car interior with a sunroof; high-end, brightly lit optical store with minimalist shelving and Zeiss medical equipment.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight and bright, white studio/retail lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is an endorsement for the 'Lianhe Optical' store in Hsinchu, specifically highlighting their use of advanced Zeiss eye-tracking and lens technology. It aims to persuade viewers of the precision and luxury of the service by showing the host's personal experience of correcting his vision issues through their high-tech examination process.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video name-drops the store and brand multiple times, shows the entire service process, and concludes with unboxing branded products and a direct recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host 'Tim' uses a characteristic energetic opening and first-person 'follow-me' vlog style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively bridges the gap between a casual personal vlog and a high-end technological product review, using the host's influencer status to build trust in the optical brand.
